Class sym

  • java.lang.Object
    • sym
  • public class sym
extends java.lang.Object
    Token symbol constants for Oberon-0 language. Aligned with OberonScanner token numbering. Note: INTEGER, BOOLEAN, TRUE, FALSE are keywords (predefined identifiers) in Oberon-0, NOT reserved words. They are returned as IDENTIFIER tokens by the scanner and recognized contextually by the parser.
